@dzupagent/agent.$comment: maxDeclarationFiles re-pinned 360->375 and maxDeclarationBytes 800000->850000 on 2026-07-22 (DZUPAGENT-ARCH-M-06 god-module decomposition, combined-batch verification): the loop-executor.ts (717->24 LOC, commit 1980cee9) and compiled-workflow.ts (685->435 LOC, commit 015febfc) decompositions each split a god-module into per-concern leaf modules, and the earlier pipeline-runtime split (11867db7) landed on the same branch; together they emit more .d.ts leaf files (measured 366 files / 809.4 KiB vs prior 360/781.3 pin). Small headroom above the measured post-decomposition surface; this reflects file-count redistribution from a single large module into leaves, not net new public API. Not a growth license. Re-pinned 375->381 on 2026-07-22 (same ARCH-M-06 track): the delegation.ts (555->178 LOC root) split added src/orchestration/delegation/types.d.ts + lifecycle.d.ts leaf files (measured 379). Same file-count redistribution rationale; not net new public API.

@dzupagent/agent-adapters.$comment: maxDeclarationFiles re-pinned 275->290 on 2026-07-22 (audit CI-green pass): agent-adapters source grew to 284 .d.ts files via prior merges (CLI backend adapters, controlled-execution, ollama) after the budget was last pinned — the overage predates and is independent of the audit-ci-red-fixes branch (284 source files at both a647707a and this branch). Small headroom added; not a growth license.
